message: `const idx = rest.indexOf('--format');` examines only the first occurrence: `node bin/cli.js version --format json --format yaml` exited 0 and printed `{"version":"0.1.0"}`, silently ignoring the unsupported `yaml` value.
schema-v3 generated trivial/medium runs require completed SURFACE_CLOSE or its canonical automatic Claude-unavailable skip before VERIFY merge.
